General.Name: Hevol Services Group Co Ltd
General.Description: Hevol Services Group Co. Limited, an investment holding company, provides property management and value-added services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers property management services, including security, cleaning, greening, gardening, and repair and maintenance services to property owners and residents, as well as property developers. It also provides community value-added services, such as home-living services, real estate brokerage, housing decoration and renovation services, community bulk purchase, online community business platform, parking space rental, and public facilities rental services. In addition, the company offers value-added services comprising site and auxiliary property management services, and full-cycle and full-process services before property sale and delivery, as well as property delivery related and other consulting services. Further, it provides property agency services. Hevol Services Group Co. Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
